patches.hypothesis: The overfitting in the original patch was caused by the lack of proper edge case handling, which led to uncovered and unaccounted for cases in the code and logic. We address this by reformulating our code and approach, and by adding additional test cases to cover all the required conditions and edge cases. We reconfigure our approach to avoid any overfitting issues while adding a sufficient amount of tests to cover all edge cases, general use cases, and other features mentioned in the definition.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the method handleSetFromGlobal not being called in the case where the try block throws an error.
